name: rayspec
description: The unscoped `rayspec` launcher — a thin bin that hands control to the RaySpec CLI (`@rayspec/cli`). Installing `rayspec` (or `npx rayspec`) puts the `rayspec` command on PATH: `rayspec init` scaffolds a starter project, `rayspec doctor`/`plan` validate and preview a deploy, `rayspec deploy` serves it. All behavior lives in `@rayspec/cli`; this package only re-exposes its bin under the bare `rayspec` name.
